title: @cryptowluha: Hui Lui bought 100 Mac Minis for a private AI server farm. One $599 Mac Mini can already replace a $200/month Claude Cod
summary: @cryptowluha: Hui Lui bought 100 Mac Minis for a private AI server farm. One $599 Mac Mini can already replace a $200/month Claude Cod
whyItMatters: Hui Lui bought 100 Mac Minis for a private AI server farm. One $599 Mac Mini can already replace a $200/month Claude Code setup for many workflows. Ollama plugs directly into Claude Code. Same interface. No API costs. Same output for a fraction of the price. Most developers still rent AI every month. A few are switching to ownership. Hardware over subscript…
